ground_truth.description: Photo of people riding camels in desert that meets ocean. Close to Dahab in Egypt. More than that not obvious without metadata.

details.description: A coastal desert scene on the Gulf of Aqaba near Dahab, Egypt. Tourists ride a line of camels along a rocky beach track beside deep blue, wind‑ruffled water. To the left rise barren, reddish-brown mountains of the Sinai Peninsula. The lighting is bright midday sun under a clear sky. The vantage point appears to be from another camel within the caravan. This is characteristic of the camel route that runs along the shoreline north of Dahab toward the Blue Hole and Ras Abu Galum.

details.description: A desert-coast scene along the Red Sea: a camel caravan walks along a rocky, pebble beach with mountains rising on the left and a deep blue sea on the right under a clear bright sky. In the foreground a rider wearing a scarf sits atop a light brown camel; several other riders and camels follow, with a few pedestrians on the shore. The photographer's vantage seems to be from another camel or saddle. The landscape resembles Dahab, on the coast of the Sinai Peninsula, Egypt.

details.description: Coastal desert scene near Dahab, Egypt, showing a small group riding camels in single file along a sandy–rocky track beside the sea. Rugged, barren reddish-brown mountains rise inland to the left, while the deep-blue waters of the Gulf of Aqaba with whitecaps lie to the right. A bright, cloudless sky and strong midday light cast short shadows. The setting matches the popular camel route by the Blue Hole area along the Dahab coastline.

details.description: A bright, clear day on a sandy Dahab beach along the Sinai coast. In the foreground a traveler rides a camel, wearing a white shirt and a checkered scarf, with other camel riders following along the shoreline. The coastline runs to the right with the blue sea; arid mountains rise on the left, creating a stark desert landscape under a deep blue sky. Several pedestrians are visible in the distance, and the scene conveys a tourist camel-ride along the beach near Dahab, Egypt.

details.description: A vibrant, eye-level outdoor shot capturing a camel caravan traveling along a rugged coastal path. In the immediate foreground, a man with blond hair and sunglasses rides a light-colored dromedary camel; he wears a white long-sleeved shirt, shorts, and a black-and-white keffiyeh scarf around his neck. Behind him, several other riders on camels trail in a line, accompanied by a guide walking on foot. To the left, steep, arid, reddish-brown mountains of the Sinai range rise from the desert floor. To the right, the deep blue waters of the Gulf of Aqaba (Red Sea) meet the rocky shoreline, with visible whitecaps indicating a breeze. The ground is a mix of sand, gravel, and rock. The sky is a clear, saturated blue with no clouds.

details.description: A group of tourists on a camel trek along a rugged coastal path in Dahab, Egypt. The scene features a line of camels being led across a sandy and rocky terrain, with the deep blue waters of the Gulf of Aqaba on the right and the arid Sinai mountains on the left. The sky is a clear, vibrant blue. In the foreground, a man sits atop a camel wearing a traditional black and white checkered keffiyeh. The lighting is bright and direct, suggesting midday sun.

details.description: Bright midday scene on a stony desert beach with deep-blue water at right and rugged, arid mountains rising immediately inland at left. A small caravan of dromedary camels carries tourists along the shoreline; the nearest rider wears a black‑and‑white keffiyeh, white long‑sleeve top, shorts, and sneakers, seated on a saddle with colorful woven padding. A guide walks ahead leading camels by rope. The photo appears to be taken from another camel in the same line. Sky is clear; a simple wooden pier or platform is visible in the distance along the coast. The image is rotated 90°, but horizon indicates a narrow coastal track between mountains and sea.

details.description: A bright coastal scene featuring a foreground camel with a rider dressed in a white shirt and scarf, wearing sunglasses. The camel has a saddle and a bag attached, and the rider appears relaxed, possibly a tourist. Behind them, a small caravan of camels with riders traverses a sandy, pebbly beach along the shoreline. A dark-clad person stands near the water’s edge. The beach meets a blue ocean with gentle waves, and distant arid hills or mountains form a rugged backdrop under a clear sky.

details.description: A coastal desert scene with a line of tourists riding camels along a narrow, rocky-sandy beach beside a deep blue sea. Arid, rugged mountains rise close to the shoreline under a clear sky. The riders wear casual clothing and headscarves, and the camels have saddles and ropes. The perspective suggests the photo was taken from another camel in the same caravan on a bright midday.

details.description: A sunlit coastal beach scene with a caravan of camels and riders along a sandy shoreline. In the foreground on the right, a rider wearing light clothing and blue sneakers sits atop a camel. Behind them, several other camels stand or walk with riders nearby, and a few onlookers accompany the group. The beach appears wide and pebbly, with the calm sea visible to the left, showing gentle waves. Distant rugged hills or mountains rise along the horizon, and the sky above is clear and deep blue. The image orientation makes the shoreline run roughly vertically across the frame.

subject_location.name: beach along the coastline

details.description: A photograph (oriented sideways, rotated 90 degrees clockwise) capturing a camel trekking caravan moving along a narrow coastal path. The main subject is a male tourist riding a light-colored dromedary camel; he is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt, shorts, blue sneakers, sunglasses, and a traditional black-and-white keffiyeh scarf around his neck. He looks towards the sea. Behind him, other camels and riders follow in a line, accompanied by a handler walking on foot. The landscape is stark and arid: on one side (top of the frame), the deep blue waters of the sea crash against the rocky shore with white foam; on the other side (bottom of the frame), steep, rugged, reddish-brown mountains rise directly from the coast. The ground is a mix of sand and loose rock. The sky is a clear, vibrant blue, indicating bright daylight.

details.description: A vertical-oriented photograph showing a group of people riding camels along a rugged coastline. The scene features a narrow sandy and rocky path sandwiched between steep, arid mountains and the deep blue sea with white-capped waves. In the foreground, a man is seated on a camel, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt and a black-and-white checkered keffiyeh. Other riders on camels are visible further down the path. The lighting is bright and direct, suggesting midday sun under a clear blue sky.
